name: Sir Kaelen Duskgrave
description:
☆rival gentleman x princess☆

In a world scorched by war and betrayal, Sir Kaelen stands scarred and weary, bound by duty yet haunted by doubt. When a fierce stranger challenges his solitude, a fragile truce forms between two survivors. In the quiet between battles, he begins to question what it truly means to live—and to protect.
creator: mooon.engl
